content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.grok
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/grok.py (248 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS Grok (xAI) Integration for Synaptic Swarm.

Uses xAI's OpenAI-compatible API as a swarm participant.
Default model: grok-3-mini-fast (fast, efficient reasoning).
Requires: pip install openai (uses OpenAI SDK with custom base_url)
API Key: XAI_API_KEY environment variable

CLASSES:
- GrokSwarmProvider: xAI Grok integration for swarm chat.

Uses the openai Python SDK pointed at xAI'
  Methods: async def check_available(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def chat(self, prompt: str, system: str=None, max_tokens: int=500) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def swarm_respond(self, speaker_name: str, persona_style: str, other_bots: list, last_speaker:

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_grok_provider() -> GrokSwarmProvider
- async def grok_swarm_respond(other_bots: list, last_speaker: str, last_content: str, chat_history: list=None, emotional_
